narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 2-B (precinct in Scioto County) has 348 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.7 percentage points.
